metadata.name: adsbee
metadata.summary: Utility software functions for interacting with an ADSBee 1090 open-source ADSBee receiver.

variables.name: adsbee.adsbee_ota.SERIAL_TIMEOUT_SEC
documentation: Long timeout since some flash operations take a while.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.get_ms_timestamp
documentation:
Gets the current timestamp in milliseconds since the object was created. Used for logging during file uploads.
@retval The timestamp in milliseconds.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.flush_input_buffer
documentation:
Gets rid of any pending input in the serial port or WebSocket input buffer. Used to avoid triggering on stale
responses from the ADSBee.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.receive_response
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.send_cmd
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.send_bytes
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.silence_console
documentation:
Silences the console output of the ADSBee to allow interaction without extra prints due to informational, 
warning, or error logs.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.get_mac_address
documentation:
Returns the MAC address of the ADSBee's ESP32 as a string.
@retval The MAC address as a string.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.write_device_info
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.read_device_info
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.ota_get_flash_partition
documentation:
Query the ADSBee for the OTA flash partition that can be written to.
@retval The partition index that can be written to (0 or 1), or None if no partition is available.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.ota_write_bytes
adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.ota_erase
documentation: Erases the writable OTA partition on the ADSBee.

methods.name: adsbee.at.ADSBeeAT.ota_write_file
